header.title: vcf ⇄ FritzBox XML Converter
header.description: Convert your contacts quickly and easily between vCard (.vcf) and FritzBox phonebook XML (.xml).

uploadBox.replaceFileHint: Click here or drag a new file to replace it.
uploadBox.dragOrClick: Drag a file here or click

fileInput.title: Input
fileInput.placeholderFritz: Paste the contents of your FritzBox XML file here.
fileInput.placeholderVCard: Paste the contents of your vCard file (.vcf) here.

fileOutput.title: Output
fileOutput.placeholderResult: The conversion result will appear here.

options.title: Options for vCard → FritzBox
options.hint: When entering a country or area code, numbers in the vCards that do not already have a country or area code will be prefixed.

errors.label: Error:
errors.noContactsFound: No contacts were found in the FritzBox phonebook.
errors.noValidVCardContacts: No valid vCard contacts were found.
